chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1382 of 2024 CP D 1481 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on CMA No.6410/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent. Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Pirzada, advocate for respondent No.5. Petitioners remained unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Same appears to be the case on previous consecutive dates. Petitions are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy hereof in connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
